nodes.name: Moheli brush warbler
nodes.summary: Moheli brush warbler（Nesillas mariae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Moheli brush warbler。

nodes.name: Moheli brush warbler
nodes.summary: The Moheli brush warbler (Nesillas mariae) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Acrocephalidae. It is found only in Comoros. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References External links Media related to Nesillas mariae at Wikimedia Commons
nodes.shortSummary: The Moheli brush warbler (Nesillas mariae) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Acrocephalidae. It is found only in Comoros.

nodes.name: Nesillas
nodes.summary: Nesillas（Nesillas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Malagasy brush warbler、Subdesert brush warbler、Grande Comore brush warbler等4种鸟类。
